title: ficus deltoidea var. angustifolia
intro: Ficus deltoidea var. angustifolia, also known as the Bintangor tree, is a plant species in the family Moraceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating diarrhea, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Ficus deltoidea var. angustifolia is often made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall health.
